ns0:entry.ns0:title: Leantime/leantime
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Leantime/leantime
Language: php
Leantime is a goals focused project management system for non-project managers. Building with ADHD, Autism, and dyslexia in mind.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PHPOffice/PhpSpreadsheet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PHPOffice/PhpSpreadsheet
Language: php
A pure PHP library for reading and writing spreadsheet files

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ZoneMinder/zoneminder
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ZoneMinder/zoneminder
Language: php
ZoneMinder is a free, open source Closed-circuit television software application developed for Linux which supports IP, USB and Analog cameras.

URL: https://github.com/akaunting/akaunting

Open Source PHP Framework (originally from EllisLab)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cedar2025/Xboard
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cedar2025/Xboard
Language: php
High-performance panel based on V2board secondary development supporting new protocols and new features

ns0:entry.ns0:title: coollabsio/coolify
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/coollabsio/coolify
Language: php
An open-source, self-hostable PaaS alternative to Vercel, Heroku & Netlify that lets you easily deploy static sites, databases, full-stack applications and 280+ one-click services on your own servers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: danielmiessler/SecLists
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/danielmiessler/SecLists
Language: php
SecLists is the security tester's companion. It's a collection of multiple types of lists used during security assessments, collected in one place. List types include usernames, passwords, URLs, sensitive data patterns, fuzzing payloads, web shells, and many more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: elementor/elementor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/elementor/elementor
Language: php
The most advanced frontend drag & drop page builder. Create high-end, pixel perfect websites at record speeds. Any theme, any page, any design.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: espocrm/espocrm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/espocrm/espocrm
Language: php
EspoCRM – Open Source CRM Application

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/filamentphp/filament
Language: php
A powerful open-source UI framework for Laravel • Build and ship apps & admin panels fast with Livewire

ns0:entry.ns0:title: glpi-project/glpi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/glpi-project/glpi
Language: php
GLPI is a Free Asset and IT Management Software package, Data center management, ITIL Service Desk, licenses tracking and software auditing.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: laravel/framework
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/laravel/framework
Language: php
Laravel is a web application framework with expressive, elegant syntax.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: modelcontextprotocol/php-sdk
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/php-sdk
Language: php
The official PHP SDK for Model Context Protocol servers and clients. Maintained in collaboration with The PHP Foundation.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pimcore/pimcore
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pimcore/pimcore
Language: php
Core Framework for the Open Core Data & Experience Management Platform (PIM, MDM, CDP, DAM, DXP/CMS & Digital Commerce)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: shopware/shopware
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/shopware/shopware
Language: php
Shopware 6 is an open commerce platform based on Symfony Framework and Vue and supported by a worldwide community and more than 3.100 community extensions

ns0:entry.ns0:title: unopim/unopim
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/unopim/unopim
Language: php
Unopim is a free and open-source Laravel-based Product Information Management (PIM) system that helps businesses manage and enrich product data from a single platform. Built to scale beyond 10M+ products, now evolving with Agentic PIM capabilities.
